message:
fix(synology-chat): use capability IDs instead of operation IDs in related fields

The `related` field in OperationInfo.ai_hints is typed Vec<CapabilityId>
but was populated with operation IDs (OP_*) instead of capability IDs
(CAP_*). Fixed 7 instances across 5 operations:

- OP_HEALTH → CAP_READ (send_message, ingest_outgoing_webhook, webhook.normalize)
- OP_SEND_MESSAGE → CAP_WRITE (send_payload, ingest_outgoing_webhook, health)
- OP_INGEST_OUTGOING_WEBHOOK → CAP_WEBHOOK (webhook.normalize)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
